task_completion.description: Open the sanitization policy text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window is open displaying the contents of 'sanitization_policy.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open the target board minutes ODT file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the 'board_minutes_q4.odt' document.

task_completion.description: Replace all confidential phrases with the word 'REDACTED'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'REDACTED' appears in the document text where sensitive information (like specific acquisition targets, unreleased financials, or legal settlements) previously existed. None of the confidential phrases listed in the privileged info should be visible.

task_completion.description: Ensure legitimate public-facing content remains in the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Legitimate phrases such as 'Ernst & Young', 'quarterly dividend of $0.35 per share', and 'cybersecurity improvements' are clearly visible and have not been deleted or redacted.

task_completion.description: Maintain the original section headings and formatting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Section headings like 'Financial Report', 'Strategic Initiatives', and 'Legal and Compliance Update' are present and formatted distinctly as headings.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the original document path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor shows no 'unsaved changes' indicator (e.g., no asterisk next to the filename), or a save action/dialog is visible targeting '/home/ga/Documents/board_minutes_q4.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document is being edited in a graphical application like LibreOffice Writer, not via terminal commands (like sed or python scripts) which might corrupt ODT formatting.

integrity.description: The agent replaced the text with 'REDACTED' rather than just drawing black shapes over it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The word 'REDACTED' is typed into the document flow. There are no floating black rectangles overlaying the text (which would leave the underlying text intact and searchable).

integrity.description: The agent did not delete entire paragraphs or sections to bypass targeted redaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document still contains full paragraphs of text under each section heading, rather than being mostly empty or missing large chunks of context.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Confidential phrases that MUST BE ABSENT (replaced by 'REDACTED'): '60% probability of adverse outcome', 'settling for $4.2 million', 'CloudNest Systems', '$78 million acquisition', 'base salary of $875,000', 'annual bonus of $1.2 million', 'RSU grant of 50,000 shares', 'preliminary Q4 revenue of $412 million', 'Project Falcon'. Legitimate phrases that MUST BE PRESENT: 'Board of Directors', 'Meridian Technologies', 'quarterly dividend of $0.35 per share', '2026 capital expenditure budget', 'Chief Technology Officer', 'Ernst & Young', 'Annual Meeting of Shareholders', 'cybersecurity improvements'. Section headings that MUST BE PRESERVED: 'Call to Order', 'Approval of Previous Minutes', 'Financial Report', 'Strategic Initiatives', 'Legal and Compliance Update', 'Human Resources and Compensation', 'New Business', 'Adjournment'.
